subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-12 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Should a black stone be placed facing the light of the sun, the signs of brilliancy would not appear
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @Manifestation of God as sun, @symbolism of color and light
